title: The Efficiency District
description: Rivet Row is not a town, it's a process. The Company, the Director, the monitors showing battle records.

lines: Rivet Row was not a town. It was a process.
Monitors on every corner showed the same thing: numbers going up. Production rates, efficiency ratings, deviation percentages. The numbers were always going up.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: The Coordinator communicated through memos. The Director communicates through numbers.

lines.speaker: Union Rep
lines.text: The Company. It doesn't have a name. Names are branding. Branding is overhead. Overhead is waste.

lines.speaker: Union Rep
lines.text: The Director doesn't punish non-compliance. The Director restructures until compliance is achieved.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: What happened to the people who weren't compliant?

lines.speaker: Union Rep
lines.text: They became compliant. That's all I know. They stop being themselves and start being their job function.

lines.speaker: Union Rep
lines.text: The monitors are new. Since last month. They show maps of places I've never been. Statistics about people who aren't here. Battle records. YOUR battle records.
